offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual approval delays cause late orders. We streamline purchase order approvals instead of manual processes via email or spreadsheets.
problem: Delays in order fulfillment due to manual purchase order approvals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums where Etsy sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try simple interface for manual order entry and email notifications
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
